test_cases:
[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_VALID_REQUEST",
    "title": "UE Initiated Detach Request with valid GUTI and Switch Off flag to MME",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on E-UTRAN",
      "UE is in ECM-IDLE or ECM-CONNECTED state"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger the UE to send a NAS Detach Request message with valid GUTI and Switch Off flag to the MME via eNodeB.",
      "Ensure the eNodeB forwards the Detach Request along with the TAI+ECGI of the serving cell to the MME.",
      "If Dual Connectivity is active, include PSCell ID in the Uplink NAS Transport message carrying Detach Request."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME receives the Detach Request with correct parameters.",
      "MME processes the Detach Request according to the specification.",
      "Security procedures are invoked if S1 connection is established and UE is not emergency attached or RLOS attached.",
      "Detach procedure proceeds according to the presence or absence of activated PDN connections."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Capture and analyze NAS message logs at eNodeB and MME to confirm Detach Request reception and content.",
      "Verify MME triggers security procedures if applicable.",
      "Check MME logs for correct processing steps."
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_CSG_CELL_NO_SUBSCRIPTION",
    "title": "UE Initiated Detach via CSG cell with no valid subscription triggers MME-Initiated Detach",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE sends Detach Request via a CSG cell",
      "Switch Off parameter indicates detach is NOT due to switch off",
      "CSG subscription for this CSG ID and associated PLMN is absent or expired"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Detach Request via the CSG cell to MME.",
      "eNodeB forwards Detach Request and TAI+ECGI to MME.",
      "MME detects missing or expired CSG subscription for the CSG ID and PLMN.",
      "MME triggers MME-initiated Detach procedure as per clause 5.3.8.3."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME initiates explicit Detach Request to UE with cause indicating access not allowed to CSG.",
      "UE receives Detach Request and removes CSG ID and associated PLMN from Allowed CSG list.",
      "Subsequent detach procedures proceed as per MME-Initiated Detach procedure."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor MME messages to UE to confirm Detach Request with appropriate cause.",
      "Check UE logs or state to confirm removal of CSG ID and PLMN from Allowed CSG list.",
      "Verify MME logs for triggering MME-Initiated Detach procedure."
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_NO_ACTIVATED_PDN",
    "title": "UE Initiated Detach when no activated PDN connection exists",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE sends Detach Request to MME",
      "UE has no activated PDN connection"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Detach Request to MME via eNodeB.",
      "MME receives the Detach Request and checks PDN connection status.",
      "MME verifies no PDN connection is active for UE.",
      "If secondary RAT usage reporting is configured, MME waits for step 11 and performs step 12 before proceeding.",
      "MME indicates to SCEF that PDN connection is no longer available if applicable.",
      "MME skips steps 2 to 10 related to bearer deactivation."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME releases S1-MME signalling connection by sending S1 Release Command to eNodeB with cause Detach.",
      "No Delete Session Requests are sent to Serving GW or PDN GW as no active PDN connections exist.",
      "If applicable, secondary RAT usage data reporting is performed before release."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Verify that no Delete Session Request messages are sent from MME to Serving GW or PDN GW.",
      "Check that S1 Release Command message is sent with cause Detach.",
      "Confirm secondary RAT usage data reporting procedure if configured."
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_WITH_ISR_ACTIVATED_BEARER_DEACTIVATION",
    "title": "UE Initiated Detach with ISR activated - EPS bearer context deactivation in Serving GW and PDN GW",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE sends Detach Request to MME",
      "ISR is activated for the UE",
      "UE has activated PDN connections"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Detach Request to MME including PSCell ID if Dual Connectivity is active.",
      "MME sends Delete Session Request (including LBI, User Location Information, Secondary RAT usage data, PSCell ID) to Serving GW per PDN connection.",
      "Serving GW receives first Delete Session Request in ISR activated state.",
      "Serving GW deactivates ISR, releases EPS bearer context information and responds with Delete Session Response (Cause).",
      "MME sends Detach Indication (Cause) to associated SGSN.",
      "SGSN sends Delete Session Request per PDN connection to Serving GW.",
      "Serving GW deactivates ISR and sends Delete Session Request per PDN connection to PDN GW.",
      "PDN GW acknowledges with Delete Session Response.",
      "PDN GW initiates IP-CAN Session Termination with PCRF if applicable.",
      "Serving GW responds with Delete Session Response to MME.",
      "SGSN sends Detach Acknowledge to MME.",
      "MME sends Detach Accept to UE if Switch Off indicates detach not due to switch off.",
      "MME sends S1 Release Command to eNodeB."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "EPS bearer contexts are correctly deactivated in Serving GW and PDN GW.",
      "ISR is properly deactivated in Serving GW.",
      "Detach Indication and Detach Acknowledge messages are exchanged correctly between MME and SGSN.",
      "UE receives Detach Accept message.",
      "S1 signalling connection is released properly with cause Detach."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Trace signaling messages for Delete Session Requests and Responses at Serving GW and PDN GW.",
      "Confirm ISR deactivation state in Serving GW logs.",
      "Monitor MME-SGSN Detach Indication and Acknowledge message exchange.",
      "Capture NAS Detach Accept message at UE.",
      "Verify S1 Release Command message sent by MME and corresponding release at eNodeB."
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_MME_INITIATED_DETACH_EXPLICIT_DETACH_REQUEST_TO_UE",
    "title": "MME Initiated Explicit Detach Request sent to UE in ECM-CONNECTED state",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "MME decides to explicitly detach UE",
      "UE is in ECM-CONNECTED state"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "MME sends a Detach Request message to UE with Detach Type set (e.g. re-attach).",
      "UE receives Detach Request and sends Detach Accept message back to MME any time after receiving Detach Request.",
      "eNodeB forwards NAS messages between UE and MME with TAI+ECGI of serving cell.",
      "If Dual Connectivity is active, PSCell ID is included in Uplink NAS Transport for Detach Accept message.",
      "MME processes Detach Accept message.",
      "MME sends Delete Session Request messages to Serving GW per PDN connection to deactivate EPS bearers.",
      "MME sends S1 Release Command to eNodeB to release S1 signalling connection."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE receives Detach Request and responds with Detach Accept.",
      "MME properly deactivates EPS bearers and releases S1 signalling connection.",
      "If Detach Type requests re-attach, UE performs re-attach after RRC Connection Release.",
      "PSCell ID is included where Dual Connectivity is active."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor NAS message exchange for Detach Request and Detach Accept between MME and UE.",
      "Trace Delete Session Request and Response messages between MME and Serving GW.",
      "Verify S1 Release Command message and eNodeB release confirmation.",
      "Check UE behavior for re-attach if requested."
    ]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_MME_INITIATED_DETACH_IMPLICIT_DETACH_NO_DETACH_REQUEST_TO_UE",
    "title": "MME Initiated Implicit Detach without sending Detach Request to UE",
    "category": "POSITIVE TEST
